name: Get Day of the Week Metrics

content.query:
SELECT
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[CallDate]) as WeekDay
,count(1) CallCount
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_CALL]
 where 
 [CallDate]>= '2022-01-01'
group BY
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[CallDate])
order BY
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[CallDate])




SELECT
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[EntryDate]) as WeekDay
,count(1) LeadCount
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_LEAD]
 where 
 [EntryDate]>= '2022-01-01'
group BY
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[EntryDate])
order BY
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[EntryDate])


SELECT
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[ContractDate]) as WeekDay
,count(1) JobCount
 FROM [EDW].[FACT_JOB]
 where 
 [ContractDate]>= '2022-01-01'
group BY
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[ContractDate])
order BY
[Division]
,DATEPART(dw,[ContractDate])
